name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0018
purpose: Generate a normalized path manifest for the first MixtarRVS rootfs.squashfs image, generate a comparable current-root manifest with the declared rootfs exclusions, and record image-vs-current path differences without mounting, modifying, or activating the image.
non_goals: Do not modify the image file.
postconditions: The inspection mountpoint is not mounted after the stage.
known_limitations: This is a path-level manifest and diff, not a content hash manifest for every file.
The current-root manifest is generated after later Base Closure stages, so current-only differences are expected.
The image still reflects compatibility layout from the current mutable source root.
Switch, rollback, bootloader, and garbage collection are still missing.
